# GitHub Social Preview

To add a social preview image:
1. Create a 1280x640 PNG image
2. Save it to this directory as `social-preview.png`
3. GitHub will display it when the repo is shared

## Recommended Design

### Layout
- **Left half**: HYPERION logo (large)
- **Right half**: 9-stage pipeline visualization
- **Bottom**: tagline + GitHub URL

### Colors
- Background: Deep black (#0a0a0f) or dark gradient
- Primary: Neon green (#00ff88)
- Accent: Cyan (#00ccff), Purple (#cc00ff)
- Text: White

### Text
- **Title**: HYPERION
- **Subtitle**: Reasoning Amplification Engine for LLMs
- **Tagline**: Transform any LLM into a 100x deeper thinker
- **Footer**: github.com/ParsaSmahmoudi/hyperion

### Tools to create
- [Canva](https://canva.com) — easiest
- [Figma](https://figma.com) — best control
- [Bannergenie](https://bannergenie.com) — GitHub-specific

## Tools for Animated Demo GIF

Record a terminal session showing the full pipeline:
- [asciinema](https://asciinema.org) — terminal recording (best for CLI tools)
- [ScreenToGif](https://www.screentogif.com) — Windows screen recording
- [Kap](https://getkap.co) — macOS screen recording
- [ffmpeg](https://ffmpeg.org) — convert to GIF

Save the GIF to: `docs/demo.gif`
